rooms.name: Oracle Jetty
rooms.description: A narrow jetty under a foreign moon. The water below reflects Camelot's rain instead of Greek stars.

encounter.name: Dream-Tax Ferryman
encounter.win: The ferryman accepts a rumor instead of a coin and points toward the Arthurian road.
encounter.lose: The ferryman takes your name as collateral and leaves you with someone else's omen.

rooms.name: Ferry Shrine
rooms.description: Bronze offerings crowd a shrine whose oldest inscription has started spelling Avalon.

recruitable.name: Omen Hound
recruitable.success: The Omen Hound joins you, tracking prophecies by scent.
recruitable.failure: The Omen Hound sneezes at your future and pads away.
